sentences.english: Hi, you must be David. I'm Karen, the hiring manager. Thanks for coming in today.
sentences.korean: 안녕, 데이빗이시죠. 저는 채용 담당자 캐런입니다. 오늘 와주셔서 감사해요.

sentences.english: Hi Karen, it's great to meet you. Thank you for having me.
sentences.korean: 안녕 캐런, 만나서 반갑습니다. 초대해주셔서 감사해요.

sentences.english: Did you find the office okay?
I did, yes. I actually took the bus, and the stop is right outside, so it was very convenient.
sentences.korean: 네, 잘 찾았어요. 사실 버스를 탔는데, 정류장이 바로 밖에 있어서 아주 편리했어요.

sentences.english: Oh good, that's one of the perks of this location. So, David, before we dive in, why don't you tell me a little bit about yourself?
sentences.korean: 좋네요, 이 위치의 장점 중 하나죠. 데이빗, 본격적으로 시작하기 전에 자기소개를 좀 해주시겠어요?

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: Sure. I graduated from State University last year with a degree in marketing.
sentences.korean: 네. 작년에 스테이트 대학교에서 마케팅 학위를 받고 졸업했어요.

sentences.english: During my final year, I completed an internship at a digital advertising agency, where I helped manage social media campaigns for several small businesses.
sentences.korean: 마지막 학년에 디지털 광고 회사에서 인턴십을 했는데, 여러 소규모 기업의 소셜 미디어 캠페인 관리를 도왔어요.

sentences.english: That experience really confirmed my interest in marketing strategy. Outside of work, I enjoy running and I recently started learning photography.
sentences.korean: 그 경험이 마케팅 전략에 대한 관심을 확인시켜줬어요. 일 외에 달리기를 즐기고 최근 사진 촬영을 배우기 시작했어요.

sentences.english: I'm excited about this role because I think it combines creative thinking with data analysis, which is exactly what I want to focus on.
sentences.korean: 이 역할에 기대가 돼요. 창의적 사고와 데이터 분석을 결합하는 거라 딱 제가 집중하고 싶은 분야거든요.

sentences.english: That's a great background. Let's talk a bit more about your internship experience...
sentences.korean: 좋은 배경이네요. 인턴십 경험에 대해 좀 더 이야기해봐요...

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
